title: Develop conference demo application using LCI and SenML
description: Implement demo CoAP resources for conference use cases: messaging, presence, rollcall, position beacons using SenML per spec/18-applications.md
close_reason: Implemented demo CoAP resources for messaging, presence, rollcall, position beacons with SenML CF=112, observable, urn:dev:mac base name in gateway app per spec. Added test, 3 codereview passes with fixes, west build and tests PASS. Scoped to app.
